name: aleksis-app-lesrooster

metadata.name: AlekSIS-App-Lesrooster
metadata.summary: AlekSIS (School Information System) — App Lesrooster (Timetable Management Using Time Grids)

documentation:
# AlekSIS (School Information System) — App Lesrooster (Timetable Management Using Time Grids)

## AlekSIS

This is an application for use with the [AlekSIS®] platform.

## Features

- Manage validity ranges for timetables.
- Manage different timetable grids for different validity ranges and groups (with slots and breaks).
- Do lesson distribution using course planning raster.
- Plan timetables using magnet board.
- Manage supervisions for breaks.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.lesrooster.models.ValidityRange.sync

Sync all lessons and supervisions of this validity range.

A validity range is a date range in which certain data are valid.
